prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次28584名、2026年扩招约9%缓解竞争、理工科专业热度高吸引报考，以及本省物理类考生略减等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年有所后移（更难进）；预测最低位次约30090名，区间29590-30590名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2023, the minimum science ranking was approximately 14124 → 12130 → 13730. After changing to Physics Category in 2024, the ranking significantly dropped to 28047, and further to 28584 in 2025, with a baseline of about 28316 in the last two years. The provincial enrollment plan was 63 in 2021, 61 in 2022, 61 in 2023, 62 in 2024, and 67 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 73, an increase of 6 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 9%, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Ranked approximately 59th in the Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 50-60 range in recent years. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative incidents. Douyin popularity ranks 41st (relatively hot), with moderately high attention on short video platforms. No record of enrollment gaps in the past five years. Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Biology A-, Pharmacy A-, etc., with coordinated development of science, engineering, medicine, and management disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Science and engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended and popular, Clinical Medicine is recommended, strongly attracting science candidates. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 314,000, slightly decreasing from 321,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 28584, an enrollment expansion of about 9% in 2026 easing competition, high popularity of science and engineering majors attracting applicants, and a slight decrease in provincial Physics Category candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be further back (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 30090, with a range of 29590-30590.
